overview.tagline: High-rise living on the Palisades with sweeping Manhattan views
overview.description: Cliffside Park is a densely populated borough perched along the eastern edge of the Palisades in Bergen County. Known for its dramatic Manhattan skyline views and high-rise residential buildings along Anderson Avenue, Cliffside Park is a melting pot of cultures with particularly strong Korean, Hispanic, and South Asian communities. The borough combines urban-style density with access to the Palisades Interstate Park and is a popular choice for NYC commuters seeking lower rents than Manhattan with comparable views.
highlights: Stunning Manhattan skyline and Hudson River views from the Palisades
One of New Jersey's most densely populated municipalities
Rich multicultural community with diverse dining options
Former site of Palisades Amusement Park (1898-1971)
Adjacent to Palisades Interstate Park trails and overlooks

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties assessed by the Borough Tax Assessor. High-rise condominiums and co-ops dominate the market.
realEstate.recentTrends: Cliffside Park's condo market is active, with demand driven by views and NYC proximity. New luxury high-rise developments continue to transform the skyline. Co-ops remain an affordable entry point, while newer condos with amenities command premium prices.
neighborhoodNotes: Anderson Avenue is the main corridor with high-rise residential buildings offering skyline views
The Palisade Avenue area features older buildings and some single-family homes
Gorge Road area offers more affordable options on the western slope
New luxury developments near the cliff edge command the highest prices

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash collection provided twice weekly. High-rise buildings have their own private haulers.
details: Single-family and small multi-family collection on designated days
High-rise buildings arrange private carting services
Trash must be in sealed bags or covered containers
Bulk item pickup by appointment with DPW

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Weekly recycling collection through the BCUA program. High-rises handle recycling through building management.
details: Commingled recyclables in blue bins for single-family homes
High-rise buildings have central recycling areas
Paper, cardboard, plastic, glass, and cans accepted
No Styrofoam or plastic bags

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water is supplied by Veolia Water. Sewer service managed through the borough and BCUA.
details: Water bills issued quarterly
High-rise buildings may bill water through condo/co-op fees
Sewer charges on tax bills or building management fees
Report water main breaks to Borough DPW

permits.title: Building Permits
permits.description: The Building Department processes construction permits for both residential and high-rise projects.
details: Permits required for all construction, renovation, and alteration work
High-rise projects require additional fire safety and structural review
Zoning Board handles variance applications
Applications at Borough Hall or online

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Parking is at a premium in this densely developed borough. Municipal lots and street parking available.
details: Resident parking permits available for designated streets
Metered parking in commercial areas
Many high-rises include garage parking for residents
Overnight street parking heavily restricted

additionalServices.title: Jitney Bus Service
additionalServices.description: Local jitney bus service provides affordable transportation within the borough and to nearby towns.
details: Routes along Anderson Avenue and connecting streets
Affordable fares for local trips
Connects to NJ Transit bus stops

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Strict noise regulations given the dense, high-rise residential character.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 8:00 AM and after 6:00 PM weekdays
Saturday construction 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM only
No construction on Sundays or holidays
High-rise residents must comply with building-specific noise policies as well
noise.source: Borough of Cliffside Park Municipal Code

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Property owners and building managers must maintain properties to code.
keyRules: Building facades must be maintained and inspected periodically
Sidewalks must be kept clear and in good repair
Snow removal within 24 hours of snowfall
Building managers responsible for common area maintenance
propertyMaintenance.source: Borough of Cliffside Park Municipal Code

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Pet ownership subject to borough licensing and building-specific rules.
keyRules: Dogs must be licensed annually with the Borough Clerk
Leash required at all times in public areas
Pet waste must be cleaned up immediately
Many high-rise buildings have their own pet policies and weight limits
pets.source: Borough of Cliffside Park Municipal Code

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Parking is strictly regulated given the borough's density.
keyRules: Resident parking permits required for overnight street parking
No parking during snow emergencies
Commercial vehicles restricted in residential areas
Alternate side parking enforced for street cleaning
parking.source: Borough of Cliffside Park Municipal Code

rentals.title: Rental Regulations
rentals.summary: Many residents are renters; rental units must meet borough standards.
keyRules: Rental registration required for all units
Certificate of Habitability required before occupancy
Co-op and condo boards may have additional subletting rules
Fire safety inspections required for multi-family and high-rise buildings
rentals.source: Borough of Cliffside Park Municipal Code

other.title: High-Rise Building Safety
other.summary: Special regulations apply to the borough's many high-rise residential buildings.
keyRules: Regular fire safety inspections required
Sprinkler and fire alarm systems must be maintained
Emergency evacuation plans must be posted and updated
Facade inspections required periodically per state law
other.source: Borough of Cliffside Park Municipal Code / NJ DCA

publicSchools.name: Cliffside Park High School
publicSchools.notes: Red Raiders; offers AP courses and vocational programs

privateSchools.name: Epiphany School
privateSchools.notes: Catholic school serving the parish community

whyMoveHere: Stunning Manhattan skyline views from high-rise condos
Quick bus commute to Midtown Manhattan
Affordable alternative to similar views in Fort Lee or Edgewater
Access to Palisades Interstate Park for outdoor recreation

commuteToNYC.primaryMethod: NJ Transit bus to Port Authority or GWB
commuteToNYC.notes: NJ Transit buses along Anderson Avenue provide frequent service to the George Washington Bridge Bus Station and Port Authority. The commute is one of the shortest in Bergen County. Jitney services supplement NJ Transit. Driving to the GWB takes about 10 minutes.

costOfLiving.summary: Cliffside Park offers relatively affordable living for the views and NYC proximity it provides, especially in co-op buildings.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Above the state average, primarily in housing costs
costOfLiving.vsNationalAverage: Significantly above the national average due to metro NYC location

pros: Manhattan skyline views at a fraction of NYC prices
Culturally diverse with excellent international dining
Active street life and urban energy
cons: Extremely dense with limited green space within the borough
Parking can be very difficult and expensive
Heavy traffic congestion on main roads
Aging building stock in older high-rises

restaurants.name: Sabor Peruano
restaurants.description: Authentic Peruvian cuisine featuring ceviche, lomo saltado, and other traditional dishes.

restaurants.name: Hiram's Roadstand
restaurants.description: Legendary hot dog stand and no-frills eatery that has served Bergen County since 1932.

restaurants.name: Chung Sol Bat
restaurants.description: Korean charcoal BBQ restaurant popular with the local Korean community.

restaurants.name: Andrea Salumeria
restaurants.description: Classic Italian deli and sandwich shop beloved by locals for decades.

restaurants.name: Empanada Mama
restaurants.description: Latin American eatery specializing in handmade empanadas and Colombian favorites.

parks.name: Palisades Interstate Park — Cliffside Park Section
parks.description: The Palisades cliffs along the borough's eastern edge are part of the Interstate Park system, with trails and scenic overlooks.

parks.name: Veteran's Memorial Park
parks.description: Borough park with playground, courts, and open space — one of the few green areas in this dense community.

parks.name: Palisade Avenue Overlook
parks.description: Scenic viewpoint offering panoramic views of the Hudson River and Manhattan skyline.

events.name: Cliffside Park Street Fair
events.description: Annual fair along Anderson Avenue with food vendors, crafts, live music, and family activities.

events.name: Independence Day Celebration
events.description: Community celebration with viewing of fireworks over the Hudson River and NYC skyline from the Palisades.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Annual holiday celebration with tree lighting, entertainment, and seasonal festivities.

attractions.name: Former Palisades Amusement Park Site
attractions.description: The site of the legendary Palisades Amusement Park (1898-1971), now occupied by high-rise apartments. A historic plaque commemorates the park's legacy.
attractions.address: Anderson Ave at Winston Drive, Cliffside Park, NJ 07010

attractions.name: Cliffside Park Public Library
attractions.description: Community library serving the borough with programs, digital resources, and multilingual collections.

shoppingAreas: Edgewater Commons and City Place (nearby Edgewater)

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets on the second and fourth Wednesday of each month at 7:30 PM
government.meetingLocation: Cliffside Park Borough Hall, 525 Palisade Ave, Cliffside Park, NJ 07010

fire.address: Cliffside Park Fire Department, Cliffside Park, NJ 07010
